name: Butter Pecan Chocolate Marshmallow Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the cake mix, melted margarine, and water until well blended.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch pan.
4. Bake for 15-18 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Remove from the oven and layer marshmallows, chocolate chips, and coconut flakes evenly over the crust.
6. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the marshmallows begin to melt.
7. Allow the bars to cool completely before cutting into serving pieces.
This recipe yields approximately 24 bars, with each bar containing about 153.6 calories and 35.9% of fat content.
